description:
LibreBase connects your QardioBase smart scale straight to Apple Health — no account, no cloud, no Qardio app required.

When Qardio shut down, the scales kept working over Bluetooth. LibreBase is a tiny, independent app that pairs with your scale, reads your weight the moment you step on, and saves it to Apple Health. Your data stays on your device.

FEATURES
• Direct Bluetooth connection to the QardioBase — works without the discontinued Qardio app
• Automatic weigh-in: step on, and your weight is captured and saved to Apple Health
• In-app BMI, calculated from your height and synced with Apple Health
• Metric or imperial — kilograms/pounds and centimeters/feet follow your region
• Battery and connection status at a glance, with one-tap reconnect
• No accounts, no servers, no tracking

COMPATIBILITY
LibreBase has so far been tested only with the original QardioBase (1st generation). QardioBase 2 and QardioBase X are not yet verified — they may work, but are untested. If you have another Qardio Base model, please try LibreBase and email librebaseapp@michelstorms.dev to tell us how it went — your reports help us support more scales, and we'll do our best to help with yours.

LibreBase is open source. It is a wellness logger, not a medical device.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Your QardioBase lives on. LibreBase reads your weight over Bluetooth and saves it straight to Apple Health — no Qardio account, no cloud, no tracking.
